short_summary: Iran deal imminent, shadow fleet seized
rationale: The Iran deal is the most impactful story for US residents — potential signing would affect Middle East policy, oil markets, and domestic political dynamics; Tren de Aragua strike and Anthropic suspension continue as background items.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: A potential US-Iran deal signing would be a major foreign policy event affecting oil prices, Middle East stability, and US military posture — but conflicting signals from Tehran keep outcome uncertain.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike
top_events.summary: US airstrike killing the Tren de Aragua leader continues the established pattern of targeted strikes against the gang; limited new impact on daily American life beyond the ongoing domestic security narrative.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Anthropic's continued suspension of AI tools under federal security review remains an active policy story affecting the US tech sector, though impact on most Americans' daily lives is limited.
